iran_nuke.notes: Day 19 00:00 - IMMINENT 100. 440kg HEU still under IAEA monitoring. Hidden HEU in underground facility unresolved. Araghchi confirms stockpile. No diplomatic path. Nuclear test not conducted but breakout capability remains.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 19 04:04 - IMMINENT 100. UAE reopens airspace (de-escalation signal). Trump continues Hormuz coalition push — 'help on the way' but allies publicly reject military involvement. European leaders explicitly rule out Hormuz deployment. Iran missile capacity degraded but still firing strategically. Witkoff-Araghchi channel active per Al Jazeera.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 19 04:04 - IMMINENT 100. IDF 91st Division ground operations continue in south Lebanon. Extensive strikes ongoing. Hezbollah rocket barrages persist. 1M+ displaced. No ceasefire signals.

turkey.notes: Day 19 02:00 - IMMINENT 79. Iranian refugees flooding into Turkey by train (airspace restricted). NATO strain deepening as allies refuse Hormuz involvement. Multiple NATO missile intercepts over Turkey unresolved.

india.notes: Day 19 00:00 - ELEVATED 25. India evacuates nationals from ME. Diplomatic balancing act. Pakistan-Afghanistan war next door increasing regional pressure. No direct escalation signals.

russia.notes: Day 19 02:00 - IMMINENT 87. Russia continues arms support to Iran. Ukraine peace talks frozen. No direct ME intervention yet. NATO alliance fracturing over Hormuz benefits Russia strategically.

china.notes: Day 19 02:00 - CRITICAL 46. Trump DELAYS China visit — 'war going on.' Hormuz coalition demand was precondition for Xi summit, now shelved. Diplomatic track frozen. Blockade rehearsals continue. No improvement in de-escalation prospects.

north_korea.notes: Day 19 00:00 - IMMINENT 78. 10 MRL missiles fired March 14 during US-SK drills. Kim observed with daughter. Exploiting US security gap in ME. No new signals since update.

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 19 04:04 - IMMINENT 100. 250 Ukrainian drones intercepted heading for Moscow over 2 days — biggest drone attack on capital in a year. Storm Shadow missiles hit Bryansk Kremniy El microelectronics factory. Ukraine recaptured parts of Kupiansk, Russian troops reportedly surrounded. Zelensky arriving UK Wed. Peace talks fizzling — Moscow refused US delegation. Russia strikes hydro plant, oil spills into Moldova.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 19 04:04 - IMMINENT 100. Kabul hospital strike death toll 400 confirmed by Afghanistan, denied by Pakistan (claims military target). UNSC resolution passed. China mediating. Open war continues. 115,000+ displaced.

top_signals: 250 Ukrainian drones intercepted heading for Moscow — biggest drone attack on capital in a year
Ukraine recaptured parts of Kupiansk, Russian troops reportedly surrounded
Storm Shadow missiles hit Bryansk Kremniy El microelectronics factory
UAE reopens airspace (limited de-escalation in Iran theater)
European leaders publicly reject Trump's Hormuz military coalition
Kabul hospital airstrike death toll 400 confirmed — Pakistan denies targeting
Iran missile capacity degraded but still firing strategically (Al Jazeera)
Peace talks fizzling — Moscow refuses US-proposed delegation for Ukraine
Zelensky arriving UK Wednesday — Starmer vows continued support

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 19 00:00): ZERO de-escalation signals across all theaters. Pakistan-Afghanistan hospital strike is worst single event of that conflict. Iran FM explicitly rejects ceasefire. China mediating Pak-Afg is only diplomatic signal but no ceasefire materialized. All conflicts intensifying.

latest_news.headline: Kabul hospital airstrike kills 400 — Pakistan denies targeting facility
latest_news.text: Death toll from Pakistan airstrike on Kabul hospital reaches 400 killed, 200+ injured. Pakistan claims it struck Siah Sang military sector in Shah Shaheed area, PD8. Afghanistan accuses Pakistan of deliberately targeting hospital. Single deadliest event of the conflict.

latest_news.headline: Israel announces 'extensive strikes' across Iran and Lebanon
latest_news.text: IDF launches extensive strikes across both Iran and Lebanon simultaneously. New wave of attacks targeting military infrastructure. Iran continues retaliatory strikes.

latest_news.headline: 200 US troops confirmed wounded in Iran conflict
latest_news.text: US military confirms 200 service members wounded since conflict began. 13 previously confirmed dead. Iranian retaliatory strikes on US bases in UAE/Bahrain/Kuwait continue.

latest_news.headline: Trump hits at UK over Hormuz refusal
latest_news.text: Trump publicly criticizes UK for not committing to Hormuz escort coalition. Alliance fractures deepen as major allies refuse military involvement.

latest_news.headline: IDF confirms expanding Lebanon ground assault — 91st Division active
latest_news.text: IDF confirms 91st Division conducting ground operations in southern Lebanon in 'recent days.' Expanded assault across multiple areas. Hezbollah retaliates with rocket barrages.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 19 03:04) - Global war probability 100%. Kabul hospital strike kills 400 — worst single event of Pakistan-Afghanistan war. Israel launches extensive strikes across Iran AND Lebanon simultaneously. 200 US troops wounded. Trump attacks UK over Hormuz. Alliance fracturing. No ceasefire frameworks in any theater. Situation deteriorating across ALL theaters.
